title: The Definitive Cobblemon Pack
description: The definitive modpack with the best selection of mods and addons to play the Cobblemon mod.
body: The Definitive Cobblemon Pack is a modpack that aims to up the experience the playing the already very good Cobblemon mod, adding other mods and addons that go well with the original. Some famous mods featured include Oh The Biomes We've Gone, Farmer's Delight, Sophisticated Backpacks and others. The goal is to not add too many mods that could draw the attention away from Cobblemon. Some of the addons added for Cobblemon are Mega Showdown, Cobblemon Rider, Radical Cobblemon Trainers, Cobblemon Integrations, CobbleTowns and others.
